changes_made: Changed k8s_networkpolicy_logging_enabled to k8s_networkpolicy_traffic_logging_enabled for clarity
review_notes: The functions generally map well to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities, which align with PCI DSS 10.1.1 requirements for audit logging policies and procedures. The naming conventions are mostly followed, but a minor change was made to improve clarity in the network policy logging function.
naming_improvements: Use 'traffic_logging' in k8s_networkpolicy_traffic_logging_enabled to specify the type of logging
title: Examine documentation and interview personnel to verify that security policies and operational pr...
step1_reasoning: The PCI DSS control 10.1.1 focuses on verifying that security policies and operational procedures for audit logging are documented and followed. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and properly configured, including retention policies. Additionally, network policies can be configured to log ingress and egress traffic for further auditing purposes.
